title: astragalus goldmanii
intro: Astragalus goldmanii, also known as Goldman's milkvetch, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a perennial legume that is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus goldmanii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
